bridge_sample.sample_design: Independent Wave 8 US English online adult bridge sample with all somatic source anchors coadministered inside the full-domain packet before outcome inspection.
bridge_sample.target_population: US English online adults aged 18 or older who can complete the instrument without assistance and pass preregistered quality-control gates.

linking_model.estimator: robust marginal maximum likelihood for ordinal item responses
linking_model.scale_identification: The v0.3.1 somatic_ambient_anxiety source metric is fixed by the four approved v0.2.0 anchor items, with Wave 8 anchor parameters estimated against that source metric.
linking_model.model_selection_rule: The primary IRT link governs claim eligibility; sensitivity models must preserve direction, magnitude class, and subgroup conclusions before any comparison is permitted.

invariance_gates.partial_invariance_rule: Partial invariance may be used only for prelisted nuisance parameters, must be documented before interpreting comparisons, and must not alter score ordering or any substantive release comparison.

domain_scoring_status.reason: Wave 8 re-administers the v0.3.1 somatic source anchors, but the v0.8.0 target release is a frozen candidate and has no observed linking evidence yet.
domain_scoring_status.required_evidence_before_scoring: Observed Wave 8 linking evidence must pass anchor drift, DIF, invariance, linking standard error, sampling, and reviewer gates in a later citable release.

domain_scoring_status.reason: Economic-vocational Wave 8 items are development-only in v0.8.0 and are not anchored to a citable scored source release.
domain_scoring_status.required_evidence_before_scoring: Observed calibration, content-validity, DIF, invariance, and release-promotion evidence must pass before domain scoring.

domain_scoring_status.reason: Epistemic Wave 8 items are development-only in v0.8.0 and do not yet have a citable scored source metric.
domain_scoring_status.required_evidence_before_scoring: Observed calibration, content-validity, DIF, invariance, and release-promotion evidence must pass before domain scoring.

domain_scoring_status.reason: Relational Wave 8 items are new development-only candidates without source-release scored continuity.
domain_scoring_status.required_evidence_before_scoring: Observed full-domain bridge evidence and later domain validation must pass before any relational score is reported.

domain_scoring_status.reason: Existential-identity Wave 8 items are new development-only candidates without source-release scored continuity.
domain_scoring_status.required_evidence_before_scoring: Observed full-domain bridge evidence and later domain validation must pass before any existential-identity score is reported.

domain_scoring_status.reason: Autonomy-surveillance Wave 8 items are new development-only candidates without source-release scored continuity.
domain_scoring_status.required_evidence_before_scoring: Observed full-domain bridge evidence and later domain validation must pass before any autonomy-surveillance score is reported.

domain_scoring_status.reason: Safety-catastrophic Wave 8 items are new development-only candidates without source-release scored continuity.
domain_scoring_status.required_evidence_before_scoring: Observed full-domain bridge evidence and later domain validation must pass before any safety-catastrophic score is reported.

permitted_claims: Wave 8 is a preregistered non-scored full-domain bridge packet.
The four v0.3.1 somatic source items are included as planned anchors for future linking evaluation.
No Wave 8 domain, cross-domain, overall, trend, or event-study score is authorized by this template.
blocked_claims: Any claim that Wave 8 somatic, domain, cross-domain, or overall ANX scores are official.
Any longitudinal, trend, cross-release, event-study, or causal capability-shock comparison involving v0.8.0 before observed linking evidence passes.
Any population or subgroup change claim that lacks a validated sampling plan, observed link, and citable release authorization.
Any claim that non-somatic Wave 8 domains are linked to a prior citable scored release.
claim_authorization.claim_review_rule: Maintainers must review public text, tables, figures, abstracts, and release notes against the blocked-claim list before publication.

blocking_rules: Block all longitudinal claims if this plan fails schema validation or repository-reference validation.
Block all trend and event-study claims while plan_status is preregistered_template or observed_pending_review.
Block any anchor-based comparison if an anchor item ID, item version, or item path differs from the source or target manifest without observed bridge evidence.
Block any comparison if fewer than four somatic source anchors are administered and analytically eligible.
Block any comparison if DIF, invariance, anchor drift, linking standard error, sampling, or release-authorization gates fail.
